_comment: Mutation testing config for @click/core. Reuses our existing vitest setup.
_mutator_comment: StringLiteral is excluded because all string literals in src are contract messages (e.g. 'Scheduler: clock must not be null'). Mutating them to '' has no observable effect on program behaviour; killing those mutations would require asserting on error-message text, which is brittle. The only non-message literals ('click', 'ContractError', etc.) are covered by existing equality tests on the enum/name.
